reason_not_executed: Stopped before training at enforceability gates 11-13; no reviewed executor.
config_hash_note: config_hash / feature_config_hash / model_config_hash are NULL because there is no committed, reviewed execution pipeline from which to derive them deterministically. This absence is the direct cause of the F-5 provenance gate (12) failure and the ML_STEP4_RUN_INVALID_PROVENANCE_MISSING status: a provenance-complete run requires these hashes to be emitted by reviewed code, which does not exist on master.
note: This is a documented restatement of the intended (pre-registered) model configuration, not a trained-model record. No model was trained.
